CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-19-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2001 Off Calendar

Deft. Carol Madreas' Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-22-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Re JOHN WATSON - Causes of Action 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 9 and 10 - GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists re any breach of duty or re his non-occupation of the unit and re tort damages. Re Causes of Action 12 and 15 - treated as a motion for judgment on the pleadings and GRANTED. Cause of Action 16 - GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists re actionable fraud or misrepresentation or justifiable reliance. Regarding Cause of Action 18 - treated as judgment on the pleadings and granted except as to the extent that emotional distress may be GRANTED, RECEOVERED AS DAMAGES PER Cause of Action 11. Re Causes of Action 7 and 13 -- triable issue of fact exists re unlawful demand for rent. Cause of Action 10 will be denied.
Re MALIK WATSON: Cause of Action 3 GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists re adequacy of remedy at law. Re Cause of Action 10 - DENIED -- triable issue of fact exists re retaliatory eviction. Triable issue of fact exists re unfair business practice and entitlement to restitution. Collection of rent unlawful. Cause of Action 16 GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists re fraud, actionable fraud or misrepresentations or justifiable reliance. Re Cause of Action 15 (abuse of process) treated as judgment on the pleadings and granted. COURT REPORTER: Joe Vickstein CSR 4780 (kl)

Motion For Sum Jgt/Sum Adjud By Defendant Carol Makreas
Off Calendar Oct-22-2001 Text Ruling

Defendant Marc Seidenfeld'S Motion For Sum Jgt/Sum Adjud
Off Calendar Oct-22-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Re SEIDENFELD: Cause of Action 11 (wrongful eviction) DENIED -- triable issue of fact exists Cause of Action 14 - GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists regarding probable cause for the bring of the unlawful detainer action. Re Cause of Action 18 - treated as judgment on the pleadings and GRANTED except to the extent that emotional distress may be recovered per Cause of Action 11. COURT REPORTER: Joe Vickstein CSR 4780 (kl)
